response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack required. They also have experience with AI agent development and various other technologies relevant to the role.
strengths: Proficient in required technologies like TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with AI agent development and diverse tech stack
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Kotlin/Java
Some experience is in slightly different contexts or older technologies
Extensive experience across many roles and projects may indicate lack of depth in a single area
